title: GrooveFest - Music Festival
hero.title: Feel the Music Vibe
hero.subtitle: Catch the beats before they fade into the night
band1.name: Neon Beats
band1.desc: Electrifying synth-pop sensations lighting up the festival stage. Simple, catchy, and unforgettable.
band2.name: Thunder Road
band2.desc: High-voltage rockers shaking the ground with guitar riffs and drum beats that hit like a storm.
band3.name: Velvet Harmony
band3.desc: Smooth pop ensemble with melodies that flow like silk and stick in your head like your favorite tune.
collections.title: Festival Lineup
product1.name: Neon Beats
product1.desc: Electrifying synth-pop sensations lighting up the festival stage. Simple, catchy, and unforgettable.

lookbook.title: Music Genres
lookbook.desc1: Feel the thunder! Rock is the heart and soul of festival energy — guitars wailing, drums pounding, leaving no stone unturned.
lookbook.desc2: Pop hits are sticky as bubblegum and shine like glitter on a dance floor — guaranteed to get everyone on their feet!
lookbook.desc3: Classic tunes that never get old, with idioms and puns aplenty — let’s turn back the clock and rock the retro vibes!
about.title: About GrooveFest
about.story: Founded in 2020, GrooveFest celebrates music in all its forms. Our mission is to bring bands, fans, and vibes together in one unforgettable festival.
about.mission: From sunrise sets to midnight beats, GrooveFest is your ultimate musical adventure, where every note tells a story.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Questions, suggestions, or just want to share the love of music? Drop us a line!
contact.name: John Doe
